DataRequest.Name: Windows: Remote PowerShell Sessions / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects basic PowerShell Remoting (WinRM) by monitoring for network inbound connections to ports 5985 OR 5986. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/security/win_security_remote_powershell_session.yml
DataRequest.DataSource: Windows Security Log via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-5156" AND destIpPort IN (5985,5986) AND permissionLevelID="44"
